function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system before task work, used canonical cast files for birthdays, and verified tie condition.
function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-31. Birthday search across 10_entities/cast showed the earliest upcoming month-day as 04-25; reading canonical file 10_entities/cast/claudia.md gives exact name Claudia Reiter with birthday 1981-04-25. A direct search for 04-25 in cast found only claudia.md, so there is no tie.
